title: Register a camper for the National Summer Camp Programme
description: Register a child aged 7 to 12 for the National Summer Camp Programme.
summary: The National Summer Camp Programme (NSCP) is the Ministry of Youth’s annual summer camp. It runs across parishes during the school holidays and gives children a mix of sports, arts, learning and community activities.
Children aged 7 to 12 are the main intake. Parents and guardians register children using the NSCP Camper Registration form.
The 2025 form is currently not open. Check back when registration opens – usually a few weeks before the summer holidays begin.

Bring (or upload) the child’s birth certificate, the parent or guardian’s photo ID and the child’s most recent school report. Let the Ministry know about any allergies, medical conditions or dietary needs so the camp staff can plan for them.
who_can_apply: parents and guardians of children aged 7 to 12

items: the child’s full name, date of birth and age
the parent or guardian’s name, address, phone and email
any allergies, medical conditions or dietary needs

items.name: Photo ID for the parent or guardian
The child’s most recent school report
A recent passport-size photograph of the child

fees: Confirm fees when registration opens. The Ministry tries to keep costs low so every child can take part.
how_long: Places are usually offered within 2 to 4 weeks of the closing date.

options.heading: Online when registration opens
content: Complete the NSCP Camper Registration form on the Ministry website during the registration window.

edge_cases.heading: If the programme is full
content: You will be put on a waiting list. The Ministry will let you know if a place opens up.

contact.agency: Ministry of Youth, Sports and Community Empowerment
contact.address:
Sky Mall, Haggatt Hall
St. Michael

assumptions: ‘Aged 7 to 12’ is the commonly-quoted NSCP range.
‘Confirm fees when registration opens’ – we have not named a figure because the form is not currently open.
‘Places are usually offered within 2 to 4 weeks of the closing date’ is an estimate.
